form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== configuratorId[配置器] orgId[业务组织] ruleType[规则类型] sequence[顺序号] =========>condition[条件]====== sourceFeatureCode[源特征码] sourceFeatureValue[源特征值] targetFeatureCode[目标特征码] targetFeatureValue[目标特征值] conditionExpression[条件表达式] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== configuratorId[配置器] orgId[业务组织] ruleType[规则类型] sequence[顺序号] =========>condition[条件]====== sourceFeatureCode[源特征码] sourceFeatureValue[源特征值] targetFeatureCode[目标特征码] targetFeatureValue[目标特征值] conditionExpression[条件表达式] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: configuratorId[配置器] orgId[业务组织] ruleType[规则类型] sourceFeatureCode[源特征码] targetFeatureCode[目标特征码]
